help.content:
# Available commands
_ _
- `!help t`: shows this text command list.
- `!help s`: shows public slash command help.
- `!help all`: shows all available help.
- `!faq`: shows an initial guide if you do not know where to start.
- `!discordid`: shows help to distinguish Discord Name from Discord ID.
- `!epicname`: shows help to distinguish Epic Name from Rocket In-Game Name.
- `!tracker`: shows help to find the tracker and MMR.
- `!peak`: shows help about which PEAK to use as MMR.
- `!idplataforma`: shows help to find the platform ID.
- `!equipo`: shows help about viewing your team and available signings.
- `!datos`: shows help about the data required for signings or registrations.
- `!replays`: shows help for uploading replays to the correct channel.
- `!info`: shows general Bigness League information.
- `!infodis`: shows information about the Bigness League Discord.
- `!inscripcion` or `!inscripcion1` to `!inscripcion6`: shows the full registration guide with a template for 1 to 6 players. Also accepts `!inscripción` or `!inscripción1` to `!inscripción6`.
- `!rawinscripcion` or `!rawinscripcion1` to `!rawinscripcion6`: shows only the registration template for 1 to 6 players. Also accepts `!rawinscripción` or `!rawinscripción1` to `!rawinscripción6`.
- `!fichaje` or `!fichaje1` to `!fichaje6`: shows the full signing guide with a template for 1 to 6 players.
- `!rawfichaje` or `!rawfichaje1` to `!rawfichaje6`: shows only the signing template for 1 to 6 players.
- `!fichajestaff` or `!fichajestaff1` to `!fichajestaff6`: shows the full Technical Staff signing guide.
- `!rawfichajestaff` or `!rawfichajestaff1` to `!rawfichajestaff6`: shows only the Technical Staff signing templates.
help.usage: Use `!help t` for text commands, `!help s` for slash commands, or `!help all` to see everything.
help.slash_empty: - No public slash commands are loaded for this help view.

discord_id_help.content:
# What should I put in "Discord ID"?
_ _
It is important to know the difference between **Discord Name** and **Discord ID**. They are very different, and the **Discord ID** is **required** to complete the signing **correctly** so the player **can play**.
_ _
 - [Extra information to tell the difference between **Discord Name** and **Discord ID**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1504631503210942544)

epic_name_help.content:
# What is the difference between "Epic Name" and "Rocket In-Game Name"?
_ _
It is important to know this difference because when submitting a **registration/signing**, you must provide the **Epic Name**. If you only have one line of text instead of two as shown in the main guide, that line is your **Epic Name**.
_ _
 - [Extra information to tell the difference between **Epic Name** and **Rocket In-Game Name**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1496951199373590629)

tracker_help.content:
# How do I find my "tracker" or rank (MMR)?
_ _
Both the **URL** and the **MMR** are required for your **registration/signing**. If this part is wrong, or someone lies about their rank through a **smurf**, **secondary account**, or an account that is not their main account, it could lead to a **permanent sanction** across the entire **Bigness League** competition.
_ _
 - [Extra information about **tracker**, **rank**, and **MMR**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1495718780691808256)

peak_help.content:
# What is "PEAK" and how do I know mine?
_ _
The **PEAK** is the number you must put in the **MMR** field when submitting either a **registration** or a **signing**. Remember that if this part is wrong, or someone lies about their rank through a **smurf**, **secondary account**, or an account that is not their main account, it could lead to a **permanent sanction** across the entire **Bigness League** competition.
_ _
 - [Extra information about what my **PEAK** is](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1497647061141815396)

platform_id_help.content:
# How can I get my "Platform ID"?
_ _
This data is **very important** because it will be the **identifying** data that allows **analysis** and **ballchasing automation** to work correctly, without problems caused by unusual names, name changes, etc. This depends on the platform you play on.
- The platforms are:
  - steam
  - epic
  - psn
  - xbl
  - switch
_ _
 - [Extra information about my **platform ID**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1497647061141815396)
  - [Players who play on **steam**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1504642379758436443/1504674921123414149)
  - [Players who play on **epic**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1504642379758436443/1504675033283297432)
  - [Players who play on **play**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1504642379758436443/1504675442853019810)
  - [Players who play on **xbox**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1504642379758436443/1504675442853019810)
  - [Players who play on **switch**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1504642379758436443/1504675442853019810)

team_info_help.content:
# How do I see my team or how many signings I have left?
_ _
This **informational** data is essential so you can **manage** your **team** and see which **roles are missing**, what **roster** you currently have, how many **signings** you have left, check your players' **MMR**, etc. It is a very **informative** command. You can use it by **messaging** the **Bigness League** bot directly.
_ _
 - [Extra information about the **view my team** command](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1497647061141815396)

signing_data_help.content:
# How should I submit a signing?
_ _
To submit one or more signings at once, you must follow a template so the league signing automation works correctly. Here is a short explanation of what each value means:
- **Jugador**
  - Name the caster will use to call you during casts.
- **Discord ID**
  - Discord ID the player will use, do not confuse it with Discord Name. If it is wrong, the player could be considered invalid or an illegal lineup.
- **Platform**
  - Platform you currently play on: steam, epic, psn, xbl, or switch.
- **Platform ID**
  - ID of the platform you play on. If you do not know what it is, review the full documentation below.
- **Epic Name**
  - Do not confuse it with IGN. This must be the Epic Name. If you do not know what it is, review the documentation below.
- **Tracker**
  - Player tracker URL. If you do not know how to get it, review the documentation below.
- **MMR**
  - Your peak MMR. If you do not know up to which season it applies or how it works, review the documentation below.
_ _
 - [Extra information about **signings/registrations**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1495738084376055818)

replays_help.content:
# How can I upload a replay to this channel?
_ _
To upload replays and have your match registered automatically and correctly, follow the [next steps if you do not know where the files you need to upload are](https://ballchasing.com/doc/faq#upload). You can also check [this other link](https://rocketleague.fandom.com/wiki/Saved_Replays#cite_note-1:~:text=English-,Saved%20Replays,-7).
- **Replay importance**
  - If nobody provides the replays, the match may be considered null and neither team will score points.
  - If a team repeats this behavior, it could lead to "-1 point" in the general standings.

league_info_help.content:
# Bigness League information
_ _
3v3 league-format competition. Registrations are currently closed because the season is currently being played. If you need more information about the league or how it works, review the links below:
- Current [S3 league rules](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1363537934665515351).
- For all questions, [important FAQ to review](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1412160784275869789).
- If you need help, remember to review the [ticket channel, opened by category](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1494159836932210769).
- Official [league announcements](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1363537483643748392).
- Current matchweek [calendar](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1016821071049150554).
- Current [league standings](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1016821399119200256).
- Results uploaded to [ballchasing](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1016821296534929469).
- Current [league participants](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1364329189393698836).
- Remember to check our [streams or community streams](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1383154599522996257)
- Also remember to check and like [our posts](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1384574383795732630)

discord_info_help.content:
# Information about the Bigness League Discord functionality
_ _
For the correct functioning of the Discord server and the competition, this league uses a specialized bot. If you want to understand how Discord works here, review the links below:
- Current [leadership](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1498743338159968476).
- If you want to play right now and [need someone to play with](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1412164963996405811).
- If you want to chat, [this is your channel](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1016823991324905472).
- Looking for a team or player? [Post it here](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1016824139295752272).
- Looking for a scrim to improve/train? [Post or search here](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1016824445266047028).
- Want to share your best clips? [Send them here](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1125524936660893846).
- Follow all our [Bigness League social networks](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1016823596645101658).
- Want to promote your content? [Do it safely here](https://discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1119271327384211526).

faq_help.content:
# If you have no idea where to start
_ _
Here is some **help** in case you need to know how to submit a **signing/registration** or understand the **functionality** of this **Discord** and this **bot**, since you can also DM it and write commands there:
_ _
- Review the FAQs with [frequently asked questions already answered](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1412160784275869789).
- To get help for the commands used by the bot and a short description, you can use the following in your [Discord DM](https://discord.com/channels/@me/1494167464580219060):
  - ``!help t`` -> Text commands.
  - ``!help s`` -> Slash commands.
  - ``!help all`` -> All available help.

guide.content:
# How to submit a registration or signing
_ _
## Player template
```
Division: 
Equipo: 
Logo: 

Jugador: 
Discord ID: 
Platform: 
Platform ID: 
Epic Name: 
Tracker: 
MMR: 
```
- `Logo:` is only required for `/hacer_inscripcion`.
- `Platform:` only accepts `steam`, `epic`, `xbl`, `psn`, or `switch`.
_ _
## Technical staff template
```
Division: 
Equipo: 

Rol: CEO, Mánager
Discord ID: 

Rol: Coach, Analista
Player: 
Discord ID: 
Epic Name: 
```
- `Rol:` accepts multiple roles separated by commas.
- `Player:` and `Epic Name:` can be omitted if the `Discord ID` already exists as a player in that team.

signing_guide.content:
# How to submit one or more signings
_ _
If you want more information about how signings work, click these links below:
_ _
 - [Information for submitting a **signing**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1495738084376055818)
 - [Information for adding a **Technical Staff** role to your team](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1495737942063185931)
_ _
## Example template you should send...
If you do not know what to put in each part, please review the [documentation for submitting a **signing**](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1495738084376055818). Remember that everything must be **correct** and use the **correct format**.
If you have **more players**, add them with a **line break**, as shown in this template, with a **maximum** of **6 players**. You must consider the players already on your team [How do I see the players on my team?](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1495720294717849702)

### Template to copy exactly as shown below with your data...
_ _
```
Division: 
Equipo: 

Jugador: 
Discord ID: 
Platform: 
Platform ID: 
Epic Name: 
Tracker: 
MMR: 
```

staff_signing_guide.content:
# How to submit one or more Technical Staff signings
_ _
If you want more information about how **Technical Staff** signings work, click this link below:
_ _
 - [Information for adding a **Technical Staff** role to your team](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1495737942063185931)
_ _
## Example template you should send...
If you do not know what to put in each part, please review the [documentation for submitting a **Technical Staff** signing](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1495738084376055818). Remember that everything must be **correct** and use the **correct format**.
If you want to add a **player** with the **same role**, separate them with **commas (",")**. If you want to add different roles to different players, add them with a **line break**, as shown in this template, with a **maximum** of **6 available technical roles**. You must consider the **Technical Staff** already on your team [How do I see the **Technical Staff** on my team?](https://canary.discord.com/channels/1016819103555657851/1495720294717849702)

### Template to copy exactly as shown below with your data...
-# If the player does not exist in the roster, additional data is required.
_ _
```
Division: 
Equipo: 

Rol: 
Jugador: 
Discord ID: 
Epic Name: 
```
_ _
### Template to copy exactly as shown below with your data...
-# If the player already exists in the roster, additional data is not required.
_ _
```
Division: 
Equipo: 

Rol: 
Discord ID: 
```

details.title: 🔰 Important details 🔰
details.description:
- If nobody reaches an **agreement** and neither team sets a **date**, the match will be marked as **void**. Neither team will receive points for this matchday.
- Everyone should do their part to **play the match** and **organize it** as **soon as possible**.
- Try to stay **flexible on both sides**. If one team cannot play, it should **propose** another **date** and continue from there.
- There are **grace minutes** depending on the scheduled **match time**. If the match is set for **16:00**, it should start no later than **16:10**, unless both teams explicitly agree otherwise.

issues.title: 🔰 In case of issues 🔰
issues.description:
- If the match is **cancelled** **1 hour before** because the **opponent** can no longer play, it will most likely be considered a **free win**, unless the opposing team agrees to reschedule. A **Staff** member will evaluate the situation.
- Any **problem** related to the **match** should be documented with evidence:
 - Take **screenshots** of incidents.
 - Save proof of **toxic** behaviour.
 - Record any **match incident**.
- The match will be considered **finished** once a Staff member switches the channel to **read-only**. Any **appeal** must be handled by **opening a ticket**.

match_data.title: ⚽ 🚗 Match data 🚗 ⚽
match_data.description:
- Match information
 - ⌛ {courtesy_minutes} courtesy minutes
 - 🗓️ {match_date}
 - ⏰ {match_time}
 - ⚔️ {best_of_label} (best of {best_of})
- Private lobby
 - Name: `{room_name}`
 - Password: `{room_password}`

open.opening_notice:
_ _
Hi {user_mention}, your ticket has been opened. Briefly explain what you need. Someone from **Staff** will help you as soon as possible.

participants.team_role_empty: That team role has no valid members to add to the ticket.

close_for_user.not_in_ticket: {user} does not have this ticket active.
close_for_user.last_participant: You cannot close the ticket only for the last active participant. Use the normal ticket close action.
close_for_user.thread_notice: Ticket closed only for {user}. The thread remains active for the other participants.
close_for_user.closed_ephemeral: Ticket closed for {user}. They can now open another ticket.

inactivity.close_reason: Your ticket has been closed automatically because of inactivity. If you still need help, open another ticket.

embed.title: ⚠️ Ticket inactivity ⚠️
embed.description:
_ _
More than {inactive_hours}h have passed without anyone interacting in the chat.
_ _
This is the **{notice_label}** notice. On the fifth notice, the ticket will be closed automatically. If that happens, you will need to open another ticket.
_ _
Remember to open a ticket when you have everything available, so the ticket queue stays manageable.
_ _
Thank you for your understanding.
embed.footer: Developed by the Bigness League team

channel_management.server_only: This command can only be used inside a server.
channel_management.text_only: This command can only be used inside a text channel.
channel_management.invalid_channel_name: This command can only be used in channels named like `『𝗝』1️⃣『𝗣』4️⃣・⚽`, `『𝗝』1️⃣『𝗣』4️⃣・📆`, `『𝗝』1️⃣『𝗣』4️⃣・✅`, or `『𝗝』1️⃣『𝗣』4️⃣・🔒`.
channel_management.unauthorized_role: Only these roles can use this command: {protected_roles}.
channel_management.protected_roles_missing: Protected roles are missing from the server: {missing_roles}.
channel_management.invalid_role_not_in_guild: The role `{role_name}` does not belong to this server.
channel_management.invalid_role_everyone: You cannot add `@everyone` to the channel.
channel_management.no_valid_additional_roles: Select at least one valid additional role.
channel_management.range_start_missing: The configured selector start role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
channel_management.range_end_missing: The configured selector end role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
channel_management.range_empty: There are no selectable roles between the configured separators.
channel_management.bulk_delete_category_not_found: No category was found with name or ID `{category_name}`.
channel_management.bulk_delete_category_ambiguous: Multiple categories are named `{category_name}`. Use an autocomplete option to select the exact category.
channel_management.bulk_delete_category_empty: The category `{category_name}` has no channels to delete.
channel_management.match_channel_team_roles_unresolved: Could not resolve exactly two team roles in this channel. Detected team roles: {role_count}.
channel_management.match_channel_caster_roles_unresolved: Could not resolve the caster role from the configured extra match-channel roles.
channel_management.dm_guild_unavailable: I could not resolve the Bigness League server to validate your roles from DMs.
channel_management.dm_member_not_found: I could not find you as a member of the Bigness League server. Join the server or check that you are using the same account.

match_channel_creation.same_team_roles: You cannot create a match using the same role twice: `{role_name}`.
match_channel_creation.invalid_team_role: The role `{role_name}` cannot be used as a team role for a match channel.
match_channel_creation.team_role_out_of_range: The role `{role_name}` is not inside the configured team role range: `{range_start}` < role < `{range_end}`.
match_channel_creation.channel_already_exists: A channel for that matchday and match already exists: `{channel_name}`.
match_channel_creation.category_missing: The configured category for this channel does not exist: `{category_id}`.
match_channel_creation.invalid_date_format: The date is invalid. Use `DD/MM/YYYY` or `YYYY-MM-DD`.
match_channel_creation.invalid_time_format: The time is invalid. Use `HH:MM` in 24-hour format.

match_replays.invalid_replay_count: You must attach between {min_count} and {max_count} `.replay` files.
match_replays.invalid_replay_extension: Only `.replay` files are accepted. Invalid files: {filenames}.
match_replays.ballchasing_token_missing: You must configure `BOT_BALLCHASING_API_TOKEN` to upload replays to Ballchasing.
match_replays.ballchasing_processing_timeout: Ballchasing has not finished processing replay `{replay_id}` yet. Try again in a few minutes.
match_replays.ballchasing_group_missing: You must configure `BOT_BALLCHASING_GROUP_ID` as the league root group to organize replays by subgroups.
match_replays.channel_group_context_missing: I could not read matchday and match number from channel `{channel_name}`. Use this command in a valid match channel.
match_replays.channel_group_context_mismatch: Channel `{channel_name}` belongs to J{channel_jornada} P{channel_partido}, but the command was executed with J{command_jornada} P{command_partido}.
match_replays.channel_division_context_missing: I could not resolve the division from channel `{channel_name}` category. Use this command inside a configured Gold or Silver category.
match_replays.worksheet_not_found: Replay sheet `{sheet_name}` does not exist in Google Sheets. Available sheets: {available_sheets}.
match_replays.google_write_failed: Google Sheets rejected the replay write: {details}.

team_profile.team_role_missing: You do not have any team role inside the configured range for this command.
team_profile.multiple_team_roles: You have multiple team roles and the bot cannot decide which one to use: {role_names}.
team_profile.dm_guild_unavailable: This command cannot be resolved in DMs because the bot's main guild is not available. Check `DISCORD_GUILD_ID` and that the bot is still in the server.
team_profile.dm_member_not_found: I could not link this DM to your member in the main guild. Make sure you are still inside the Bigness League server.
team_profile.google_dependencies_missing: Google Sheets dependencies are missing from the bot environment.
team_profile.google_service_account_missing: You must configure `BOT_GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE` to use Google Sheets.
team_profile.google_service_account_not_found: The configured Google Sheets credentials file does not exist: `{path}`.
team_profile.image_dependencies_missing: The `Pillow` dependency is missing to render the team profile as an image. Run `pip install -e .` to install it.
team_profile.team_sheet_empty: The sheet `{sheet_name}` has no usable data.
team_profile.team_sheet_layout_invalid: The sheet `{sheet_name}` does not match the expected format for team `{role_name}`.
team_profile.team_not_found: No row was found in `{sheet_name}` for role `{role_name}`.

team_signing.invalid_message_link: The message link is invalid. It must be a Discord link with guild, channel, and message IDs.
team_signing.foreign_guild_message_link: The link points to a different server. Current guild: `{expected_guild_id}`. Linked guild: `{linked_guild_id}`.
team_signing.message_channel_not_found: The linked message channel was not found: `{channel_id}`.
team_signing.unsupported_message_channel: The linked message must belong to a text channel or thread.
team_signing.message_not_found: The linked message was not found: `{message_id}`.
team_signing.message_fetch_forbidden: The bot cannot access the linked message. Check its permissions in that channel.
team_signing.message_fetch_failed: The linked message could not be fetched from Discord: {details}.
team_signing.invalid_message_format: The linked message does not follow the expected signing import format: {details}.
team_signing.invalid_technical_staff_message_format: The linked message does not follow the expected technical staff import format: {details}.
team_signing.no_import_payload_provided: You must provide at least a player message link or a technical staff message link.
team_signing.invalid_interactive_team: You must select a valid team from the interactive command list.
team_signing.unsupported_interactive_staff_role: The technical staff role `{staff_role}` is not supported.
team_signing.interactive_player_not_found: Discord `{discord_name}` was not found as a player in `{team_name}`.
team_signing.interactive_staff_role_occupied: The role `{staff_role}` is already occupied in `{team_name}`.
team_signing.no_available_interactive_staff_roles: There are no available technical staff roles for that team.
team_signing.import_payload_mismatch: The linked messages do not match on Division/Team. Players: `{player_division}` / `{player_team}`. Staff: `{staff_division}` / `{staff_team}`.
team_signing.team_sheet_layout_invalid: The sheet `{sheet_name}` does not follow the expected layout for signing imports.
team_signing.no_free_team_block: There is no free team block left in `{sheet_name}` for `{team_name}`.
team_signing.no_free_registration_block: There is no free team block left in the configured divisions ({sheet_names}) for `{team_name}`.
team_signing.team_already_registered: The registration cannot be completed because `{team_name}` already exists in `{sheet_name}`.
team_signing.technical_staff_role_not_found: The technical staff row `{role_name}` does not exist for `{team_name}` in `{sheet_name}`.
team_signing.technical_staff_player_not_found: Technical staff `{role_name}` could not be completed because Discord `{discord_name}` does not exist in the player roster for `{team_name}` in `{sheet_name}`.
team_signing.technical_staff_player_duplicate: Technical staff `{role_name}` could not be completed because Discord `{discord_name}` appears more than once in the player roster for `{team_name}` in `{sheet_name}`.
team_signing.player_not_found: No player with Discord `{discord_name}` was found in Google Sheets.
team_signing.technical_staff_member_not_found: No technical staff role with Discord `{discord_name}` was found in Google Sheets.
team_signing.member_not_found: No player or technical staff role with Discord `{discord_name}` was found in Google Sheets.
team_signing.player_duplicate: There are multiple players with Discord `{discord_name}` in Google Sheets: {locations}. Fix it manually before continuing.
team_signing.member_duplicate: Discord `{discord_name}` appears in more than one team block: {locations}. Fix it manually before continuing.
team_signing.new_team_min_players: To register the new team `{team_name}`, you must provide at least 3 players. Provided players: {player_count}.
team_signing.player_already_registered_in_team: The new team `{team_name}` cannot be registered because Discord `{discord_name}` already belongs to another team as a player: {locations}.
team_signing.remaining_signings_invalid: The remaining signings cell is invalid for `{team_name}` in `{sheet_name}`.
team_signing.remaining_signings_exceeded: There are not enough remaining signings in `{team_name}`. Remaining: {remaining_signings}. Requested: {requested_signings}.
team_signing.team_roster_full: There is not enough room in `{team_name}` for these signings. Free slots: {available_slots}. Requested signings: {requested_slots}.
team_signing.google_write_failed: Google Sheets rejected the signing write request: {details}.

team_role_assignment.participant_role_missing: The configured participant role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
team_role_assignment.player_role_missing: The configured player role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
team_role_assignment.staff_ceo_role_missing: The configured staff `CEO` role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
team_role_assignment.staff_analyst_role_missing: The configured staff `ANALYST` role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
team_role_assignment.staff_coach_role_missing: The configured staff `COACH` role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
team_role_assignment.staff_manager_role_missing: The configured staff `MANAGER` role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
team_role_assignment.staff_second_manager_role_missing: The configured staff `SECOND MANAGER` role does not exist: `{role_id}`.
team_role_assignment.staff_captain_role_missing: The configured staff `CAPTAIN` role does not exist: `{role_id}`.

slash.forbidden: You do not have permission to run this command.
slash.bot_missing_permissions: The bot needs enough permissions to manage the channel.
slash.discord_forbidden: Discord rejected the action. Check the bot permissions.
slash.http_error: Discord returned an error while updating the channel.
slash.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred while processing the command.

channel_management.match_played_summary: The channel is now read-only for the rest of the roles. Staff, Administrador, and Ceo keep write access.
channel_management.matchday_closed_summary: The channel is now closed for unprotected roles. Only Staff, Administrador, and Ceo keep access.
channel_management.bulk_delete_summary: Bulk delete completed. Deleted {deleted_count} channels from `{category_name}`.
channel_management.reopen_summary: The channel has been reopened. Write access was restored for the roles that already had access.
channel_management.reopen_with_roles_summary: The channel has been reopened. Write access was restored for the roles that already had access and these roles were added: {roles}.
channel_management.add_roles_summary: These roles were added to the channel: {roles}.
channel_management.archive_above_separator_summary: Channel archived. It was moved to the configured category above the separator.
channel_management.archive_below_separator_summary: Channel archived. It was moved to the configured category below the separator.
channel_management.match_scheduled_summary:
# {green_arrow} Scheduled time
_ _
- Both teams have reached an agreement and the schedule has been fixed.
  - ️ **<t:{timestamp}:F>**
  - ⌛ **<t:{timestamp}:R>**
- If a team cannot play in the end, they must warn in time while mentioning the opposing team.
- {team_mentions}
- Information to {caster_mentions}
channel_management.match_in_progress_summary:
# {green_arrow} Schedule in dispute
_ _
- The fixed schedule has been cancelled.
- If no one reaches an agreement, the match will be voided.

match_channel_creation.created_summary: Created {channel} in `{category}` for matchday {jornada}, match {partido}, between {team_one} and {team_two}, and posted the channel welcome message.

team_signing.completed: Registered {inserted_count} signings in `{team_name}` within `{division_name}`. Current roster: {total_players}/6.
team_signing.team_role_created: Created the Discord role for `{team_name}` with a random color, shown separately in the member list, and sorted it alphabetically inside the team-role range.
team_signing.technical_staff_completed: Updated technical staff for `{team_name}` in `{division_name}`. Updated rows: {updated_count}.
team_signing.staff_role_sync_summary: Technical staff roles: new={assigned_count}, removed={removed_count}, already_set={already_count}, unresolved={unresolved_count}, ambiguous={ambiguous_count}.
team_signing.technical_staff_removed: Removed `{discord_name}` from technical staff in `{team_name}` within `{division_name}`. Removed roles: {staff_roles}.
team_signing.role_removal_no_changes: There were no Discord roles to remove for `{member_name}`.
team_signing.role_removal_unresolved: No Discord member was found to remove roles for `{discord_name}`.
team_signing.role_removal_ambiguous: There are multiple Discord matches for `{discord_name}`. Roles were not removed automatically.
team_signing.role_removal_failed: The Google Sheets removal was applied, but Discord roles could not be removed: {details}.
team_signing.roster_player_modified: `{discord_name}` has been updated in the `{team_name}` roster in `{division_name}`.
team_signing.role_assignment_summary: Role assignment: new={assigned_count}, already_set={already_count}, unresolved={unresolved_count}, ambiguous={ambiguous_count}.

visibility.content:
# Where can I see my signing?
{team_lines}{staff_lines}

removal_visibility.content:
# Where can I see my removal?
{lines}

team_role_assignment.completed: Role synchronization completed for `{team_name}`: new={assigned_count}, already_set={already_count}, unresolved={unresolved_count}, ambiguous={ambiguous_count}.
team_role_assignment.staff_role_sync_summary: Technical staff role synchronization: new={assigned_count}, removed={removed_count}, already_set={already_count}, unresolved={unresolved_count}, ambiguous={ambiguous_count}.
